generated_exposure.exposure_text: Did you know that our alliance commitments are actually making us LESS secure? While we spend billions on collective defense, our partners are cutting their own budgets. It's time to demand real burden-sharing or reconsider these outdated agreements. #NationalSecurity #AllianceCommitment
